red_lines: North Korean nuclear or missile attacks
Japanese historical revisionism on colonial era
core_narratives: Balanced diplomacy between US and China

decision_history.event_description: Elected president after constitutional crisis and Yoon impeachment
decision_history.decision_taken: Won snap election on platform of democratic restoration and economic reform
decision_history.outcome: Strong initial mandate, reset of foreign policy approach

decision_history.event_description: US tariffs and pressure on semiconductor exports to China
decision_history.decision_taken: Navigated between US security demands and China market access, sought exemptions for Korean chipmakers
decision_history.outcome: Partial accommodations achieved, maintained both relationships

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: Democratic Party, labor unions, youth voters, progressive civil society

military_posture.force_disposition: peninsula defense with advanced missile defense systems
